purpose: Single source of truth for the Passy-Franklin asset gate. Read by (a) the SwiftPM build-tool plugin so `swift build` refuses to produce an app without these assets, (b) the Swift FranklinLaunchGate so the running app refuses to render a violated state, (c) the XCTest suite so CI fails before either layer ships. All three layers MUST agree on this list.

required_assets.label: Franklin_Passy_V2.fblob
required_assets.purpose: 1.5M-tri Passy mesh with FACS-52 blendshape rig (Duplessis 1778 reference)

required_assets.label: Franklin_Z3_Materials.metallib
required_assets.purpose: Compiled Metal shaders for the Z3 7-pass pipeline

required_assets.label: beaver_cap_spectral_lut.exr
required_assets.purpose: Spectral reflectance LUT for Franklin's beaver-fur Passy cap

required_assets.label: anisotropic_flow_map.exr
required_assets.purpose: Anisotropic strand-flow map for hair + cap shader

required_assets.label: claret_silk_degradation.exr
required_assets.purpose: Period-aged claret silk reflectance LUT (frock coat lining)

required_assets.label: styletts2_franklin_v1.coreml.mlmodelc/Manifest.json
required_assets.purpose: StyleTTS 2 CoreML manifest — production voice model on Apple Neural Engine
